content.rendered:
In this week’s episode of “Marketing In The Now,” host David Reske sits down with Marina Erulkar, founder of Hampstead Solutions and a seasoned expert in scaling businesses. Marina discusses the critical balance between focus and efficiency required for sustainable business growth. Drawing from her vast experience across multiple industries, including technology, financial services, and healthcare, Marina shares valuable insights on identifying the right opportunities for growth and optimizing resources to achieve ambitious growth objectives. The episode delves into practical strategies for streamlining operations, automating routine tasks, and overcoming resistance to change, illustrated with real-life success stories from Marina’s consultancy work. Tune in to learn how you can apply these principles to transform and scale your business effectively in today’s competitive market.

This episode promises to equip listeners with the knowledge and tools needed to navigate the complexities of business growth with strategic precision and operational efficiency.
